BEM-1022 | 2026-05-31 | 16:57 (UTC+3)

Purpose: define safe intake rules for future external proof receipts.

## Directories

| Directory | Receipt type | Status before real receipt |
|---|---|---|
| `governance/proofs/external/telegram/` | Production Telegram webhook receipt | blocked |
| `governance/proofs/external/runtime/` | Approved live runtime execution receipt | blocked |
| `governance/proofs/external/claude/` | External Claude audit result | blocked |

## Required rules

- Do not store secret values, tokens, PATs, API keys, bot tokens or raw credentials.
- Do not write issue #31.
- Do not claim Release PASS from GPT self-claims.
- Every receipt must reference a validator and schema.
- Every receipt must be auditable without relying on chat-only statements.

## Validators

| Receipt | Validator |
|---|---|
| Production Telegram | `governance/validators/validate_telegram_production_receipt.py` |
| Live runtime | `governance/validators/validate_live_runtime_receipt.py` |
| External Claude audit | `governance/validators/validate_external_claude_audit_result.py` |
| Release decision | `governance/validators/validate_release_decision.py` |

No Release PASS is issued by this README.
